seo_title: Scorpio February 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
h1: Scorpio February 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
meta_description: Scorpio February 2026 horoscope: Saturn in Aries (your 6th), the Aquarius solar eclipse in your 4th, and the Leo full moon in your 10th. Key dates, love, career, and Amethyst as crystal of the month.
energy_theme: Home reconstruction beneath a public peak
key_dates_overview: Feb 1 — Full Moon in Leo (10th house)
Feb 17 — New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius (4th house)
Feb 26 — Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces (5th house)
affirmation: I rebuild my foundation — privately, completely.
content:
This Month's Energy

Scorpio, February 2026 splits your chart into two realities: a public peak and a private rebuild. The Leo full moon on Feb 1 lights up your 10th house of career and visibility — a role, title, or public storyline culminates. Then Saturn enters Aries on Feb 13-14 and begins a 2.5-year cycle in your 6th house of work, health, and daily service. The Aquarius solar eclipse on Feb 17 lands in your 4th house of home, family, and foundations — the most private part of your chart. The theme: home reconstruction beneath a public peak. Everyone sees your rise; only you see the foundation being relaid.

Key Dates

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Scorpio | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|------------------|------------| | Feb 1 | Full Moon in Leo (Snow Moon) | A career or visibility arc peaks in your 10th house | Do: claim the title / Avoid: performing for validation | | Feb 13-14 | Saturn enters Aries | A 2.5-year cycle of daily work and health begins in your 6th house | Do: commit to one sustainable practice / Avoid: punishing regimens | | Feb 17 | New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius 28°04' | Eclipse in your 4th house rewrites home, family, or living foundation | Do: name what home means now / Avoid: signing a lease or mortgage this week | | Feb 17-20 | Saturn-Neptune conjunction at Aries 0° | Daily work meets calling | Do: align vocation with values / Avoid: splitting work from meaning | | Feb 26 | Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces | Your 5th house of creativity and romance slows | Do: revisit old creative work / Avoid: launching new romantic storylines | | Feb 28 | Six-planet alignment | Stabilizes the foundation rebuild | Do: write your home vision / Avoid: reopening old family wounds |

Career & Money

The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your 10th house is the visibility peak of your first quarter — a role, a launch, or a recognition moment. Saturn entering your 6th house from Feb 13 then begins a 2.5-year arc of getting serious about daily craft and health. As a Scorpio, your power comes from depth, and Saturn in the 6th rewards consistent, sustainable practice over heroic sprints. The 4th-house eclipse on Feb 17 can shift your living situation, family structure, or sense of inner foundation — work and home may reorganize together. Mercury Rx in your 5th from Feb 26 brings creative review. Money: steady, with potential for a property or family-related decision. For stones traditionally associated with prosperity, see /crystals-for-wealth/. Scorpio, the Feb 1 Leo full moon in your 10th house is the visibility peak of your first quarter — a role, a launch, or a public recognition moment. Saturn entering your 6th from Feb 13 then begins a 2.5-year arc of getting serious about daily craft and health. As a Mars-and-Pluto-ruled water sign, your power comes from depth and endurance; Saturn in the 6th rewards consistent, sustainable practice over heroic sprints. The 4th-house eclipse on Feb 17 can shift your living situation, family structure, or sense of inner foundation — work and home may reorganize together. Mars, your traditional ruler, in Cancer (your 9th house) all month supports expansive career moves through teaching, publishing, or international work. Mercury Rx in your 5th from Feb 26 brings creative review.

Love & Relationships

Mars, your traditional ruling planet, is in Cancer (your 9th house) all month, supporting expansive, worldview-deepening love — a partner who teaches you something, or romance with someone from a different background. The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your 10th can make a relationship more visible (or make you attractive at work). The 4th-house eclipse on Feb 17 is the private love story: family dynamics, a home decision with a partner, or a release of inherited relational patterns. Single? Saturn in your 6th says: someone steady, someone who shows up daily, out-charms the dramatic. For stones traditionally connected with love, see /crystals-for-love/ and /crystals-for-anxiety/. Mars in your 9th house all month supports expansive, worldview-deepening love — a partner who teaches you something, or romance with someone from a different background, country, or faith. The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your 10th can make a relationship more visible (or make you attractive at work). The 4th-house eclipse on Feb 17 is the private love story: family dynamics, a home decision with a partner, or a release of inherited relational patterns you've carried since childhood. Scorpio tends to merge; Saturn in your 6th says: build the daily structure that lets intimacy thrive without collapsing your separate self. Single? Someone steady, who shows up daily, out-charms the dramatic. For more on stones traditionally connected with depth and protection, browse /crystals-for-anxiety/.

Health & Wellness

Saturn entering your 6th house for 2.5 years makes daily health the central work — and Scorpio tends to push through until breakdown. The lifestyle cue for February is structure, not intensity: consistent sleep, hydration, and one daily practice outperform any detox. The Feb 1 Leo full moon can stress your public-facing energy; protect recovery time after a launch or visibility moment. The 4th-house eclipse may surface family-of-origin patterns — therapy, journaling, or bodywork are well-supported now. Amethyst is traditionally used as a calming symbol; it is not a medical intervention.

Crystal of the Month

Amethyst — the calm depth-keeper — is Scorpio's crystal for February 2026. Why this crystal fits Scorpio this month. As a water sign ruled by Mars and Pluto, you move through intensity as your native tongue — but February stacks a 10th-house full moon, a 6th-house Saturn ingress, and a 4th-house solar eclipse in 17 days. The depth is enormous. Amethyst is traditionally associated with calm, spiritual clarity, and the gentle transmutation of dense emotion — exactly the support your water-sign intensity needs when the foundation is being relaid. How to use it during February. Place a piece in your bedroom during the Feb 17 4th-house eclipse to support dreamwork and family-processing. Hold it during any family conversation. Keep it on your desk from Feb 13 for 6th-house daily-rhythm support. Best date to use it. February 17, the 4th-house eclipse — set it near your bed while you write your home vision. Read more. Full Amethyst meaning guide and the Scorpio crystals collection. Scorpio benefits from working with Amethyst in private, intentional spaces rather than public ones — your sign processes energy through depth, and Amethyst supports that inner work. A bedroom arrangement is ideal: place a piece on your nightstand for the entire month, and especially during the Feb 17 4th-house eclipse, when family-system patterns may surface in dreams. As a water sign co-ruled by Mars and Pluto, you can also pair Amethyst with Malachite or Obsidian (your sign's traditional allies) for transformation work. On Feb 17, hold the stone against your heart while you walk through your home. Cleanse it weekly in moonlight — eclipse season stirs dense energy, and a Scorpio's stone works harder than most.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

The 4th-House Foundation Ritual — February 17 (eclipse) 1. Cleanse. Place your Amethyst in salt water for 30 seconds on the morning of Feb 17, then dry it gently. 2. Intention. Because the eclipse activates your 4th house of home and foundation, write: What I want my home to feel like. What I am ready to release from my family line. 3. Action. Hold the Amethyst against your heart and read both lists silently. Then walk through your home with the stone, pausing in each room. Scorpio processes through space and body, not just mind. 4. Reflection. On Feb 28 (six-planet alignment), sit in the room that felt heaviest during the walk. Place the Amethyst there for 24 hours. Let the room clear.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with depth, protection, transformation, and emotional release — curated for your water-sign nature and the foundation-rebuild year ahead.

FAQ

Is February 2026 a good month for Scorpio? It opens publicly (10th-house full moon Feb 1) and closes privately (4th-house eclipse Feb 17). Saturn in your 6th from Feb 13 makes daily health the 2.5-year work. Both public and private lives are being restructured. How will Saturn entering Aries affect Scorpio? It enters your 6th house of work, health, and daily service for 2.5 years. Sustainable daily practice becomes your superpower. Avoid burnout cycles. How will the February 17 solar eclipse affect Scorpio? In your 4th house of home, family, and foundation. A living situation, family dynamic, or inner base is being rewritten. Don't sign property contracts eclipse week. What is the best crystal for Scorpio in February 2026? Amethyst, for calm depth during a high-intensity month. Alternatives: Obsidian for protection, Malachite for transformation. Full collection: Scorpio crystals. Will Mercury retrograde affect Scorpio romance? Mercury Rx in your 5th house from Feb 26 brings creative and romantic review — past flames, old projects, or revisited storylines. Revisit, don't commit.
